dialogos.texto_en: Ta-dah! This is the hotel\nwe'll be staying at, starting today!
So, how do you like it?\nIt's awesome, huh?
Huh? What's wrong you two?
Well, I expected it to be somewhat luxurious,\nbut I never imagined it would be this high-end...
We're celebrating our graduation,\nso it's okay to indulge a little, right?
Is this just a 'little' indulgence?
This hotel has a large variety of food, such\nas Japanese, Western, and Chinese. Their flavors\nare very well known, I'm looking forward to it.
Oh, by the way, the cake here is also said to be\nreally delicious.
Wow...
Waaa! Amazing!\nThey even have a pool!
There's a fitness center too,\nso no worries if we eat too much good food, right?
That's not the reason it's there though, is it?
By the way, there are other reasons\nwhy we chose this hotel!
It's conveniently located near tourist spots. There are\nmany places we want to visit...and you know,\nwe'll get tired if we're always on the move, right?
The hotel also provides various activity plans,\nthat make it sooo easy to sign up.\nThat's a plus too!
You put some thought into choosing this hotel,\ndidn't you.
I mean...it is our graduation trip, after all.\nI tried my best to make it a special memory.
Then let's use this hotel as our base,\nand have fun exploring Okinawa!
Yeah, of course!\nWe're gonna have a blast!
Hey, you two, don't be too loud.\nYou'll disturb others.
Ahaha...
Sorry...
Well then, let's check in as fast as possible.
But first, we need to decide who's staying where.
Oh, right.\nWasn't the reservation for four twin rooms\non the same floor?
Yeah, we've booked four in a row on the same floor.
(Twin rooms...)
(W-woah! What am I thinking?!\n It's not good for me to share a room with Yotsuba!\n I should room with Raiha instead...)
Alright...
Huh?
It's better if Uesugi-san\nrooms with Raiha-chan, right?
Huh? Is that okay with you?
Eh? Why wouldn't it be?
Well, I mean...
Ummm, Yotsuba-san,\nyou don't wanna room with big bro?
RA-RA-RA-RAIHA?!
Huh...?
AH!
*sigh*\nReally now. My lord.
What do you want to do?\nDo you want to stay with Futaro?
N-n-n-nothing that drastic?!
What the? I don't understand.
Hmm, I didn't know Yotsuba was\nmore of a child than Raiha-chan.\nI'm getting worried now.
B-but!\nSharing the same room is a problem!\nEven if they are...you know, dating...
O-of course.\nYotsuba can room with Raiha.
Okay, I'm fine with that.
How about you, Futaro?
He's the only boy,\nso shouldn't he get a room by himself?
Yeah, that makes sense.
Then, what shall we do?
Can I room with Itsuki-chan?
Please take responsibility\nfor cleaning up your own room.
Y-you don't need to make such a serious face.\nIt's okay, it's only four days.
Then, I'm with Miku.
Okay, sounds good to me.
Alright, now that the room assignments are settled,\nlet's check in right away.
It's already evening,\nso let's just leave our luggage with the bellhop\nand have dinner at the restaurant.
Yes, let's do that!
Come on, Yotsuba!\nDon't just stand there,\nlet's go put our luggage away.
Huh?!\nWhat have I been doing this entire time...?
Yotsuba-san, Yotsuba-san.
Ah, yes?
It's okay, the trip has just begun!\nLet's do our best!
O-okayyy...
